name: xf_cep_not_mid_release_join_order
drl: rule NT when $a : E0() not E1(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) $c : E2(this before[0ms,50ms] $a) then end
comment: D-134 (§3B) FENCED within-close-time order: not_mid $a:E0 not E1(before $a) $c:E2(before $a). The not releases E0@0 at its window close; the DOWNSTREAM E2 join emits (E0,E2@-3)+(E0,E2@-45) — both at the SAME not-close-time, so their order is a within-close-time residual. The pop-time do_join_node scans descending-ts then PREPENDS, reversing vs Drools' D-125 flush order. FIRING SET is 0-div; order-only. Not gated (§6 heap/composition residual). See DECISIONS D-134.
